sections.paragraph:
αἰσχρολόγος, ου, ὁ (Pollux 6, 123; 8, 80f ) a foulmouthed person (s. αἰσχρολογία) D 3:3.—M-M. s.v. αἰσχρολογία.

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 29
